extension.summary: View USB cameras, capture cards, and video devices in Kodi
View USB cameras, capture cards, and video devices in Kodi
extension.description:
USB Camera Viewer allows you to view live video from USB cameras, HDMI/composite capture cards, and other V4L2 video devices directly in Kodi.
Supports: - USB webcams and cameras - HDMI capture cards (Elgato, AVerMedia, generic) - Composite/S-Video capture cards - Game capture devices (PS Vita, consoles via capture card) - Any V4L2 compatible video device
Perfect for LibreELEC users who want to use their TV as a monitor for cameras or game consoles via capture cards.
Features: - Auto-detection of video devices - Configurable resolution and framerate - Multiple input source selection - Low-latency playback mode - Device favorites and naming

USB Camera Viewer allows you to view live video from USB cameras, HDMI/composite capture cards, and other V4L2 video devices directly in Kodi.
Supports: - USB webcams and cameras - HDMI capture cards (Elgato, AVerMedia, generic) - Composite/S-Video capture cards - Game capture devices (PS Vita, consoles via capture card) - Any V4L2 compatible video device
Perfect for LibreELEC users who want to use their TV as a monitor for cameras or game consoles via capture cards.
Features: - Auto-detection of video devices - Configurable resolution and framerate - Multiple input source selection - Low-latency playback mode - Device favorites and naming
extension.news:
v2026.01.28 - Improved device access reliability with retry logic - Better error handling for device busy/unavailable states - Fixed thumbnail capture releasing device properly - Improved LibreELEC compatibility
v2026.01.27 - Initial release - Support for USB cameras and webcams - Support for HDMI/composite capture cards - Support for game capture devices (PS Vita, consoles) - Auto-detection of V4L2 video devices - Configurable resolution and framerate - Low-latency playback mode
